Case Study 01 — Copywriting

Gartay Root Revival Oil

Email Copywriting & Content Strategy

A warm, trust-first email campaign for a natural hair brand.

Audience: Nigerian women aged 25–40 experiencing hair breakage. The brief asked for subject lines, a full conversion email (200–300 words), and a 7-day content calendar — without being salesy.

The Brief

"Write 5 email subject lines for a natural hair growth oil. Target: Nigerian woman, 25–40, struggling with hair breakage. Pick your best and write the full email body. Goal: make her click 'Buy Now'. Be real, be warm, make her trust the brand."

Subject line strategyAudience research Conversational copyTrust-building Content calendarEmail design

Designed email — Gartay Root Revival Oil

View full email design →

Subject Lines

01Your Hair Doesn't Hate You. It Just Needs Love ❤️
02The Only 3 Things Your Hair Needs 🌿
03If Your Edges Have Been Acting Funny…
04What Happens When You Simplify Your Routine? 🤔
05Your Wig Should Not Be Your Only Option 🪮Selected

Full Email Copy

Subject: Your Wig Should Not Be Your Only Option

Hey sis,

A lot of Nigerian women and their wigs are in serious relationships right now. If you know, you know.

Not because natural hair isn't beautiful — it is. But when you're installing a frontal every other week because your edges are ghosting you like they owe you money, and your hair keeps breaking… that's a different story.

Gartay is three ingredients: chebe powder, fenugreek, and black seed oil. No long list of chemicals you need a degree to pronounce. Just natural ingredients that have been used for ages.

Here's the thing — when you're layering five creams, two oils, and three leave-ins, you're basically running a chemistry experiment on your scalp. That's how you damage your hair even more.

This is just three natural things our people have always known work. Nothing complicated.

Women using it say their edges are filling back in. The breakage has calmed down. When they take down their braids, they're not crying anymore.

Get Yours Now →
P.S. Still wearing wigs? That's fine. But now you'll have a choice, not just a cover-up.

Case Study 03 — Outreach & Automation

Botrex Technology — AutoWave Pro

Cold Email Copywriting · Apollo · Zapier · Mailchimp

Personalised outreach campaign for an AI productivity platform — 10 sign-ups in week one.

Sourced and enriched a lead list using Apollo, built an automated email delivery workflow in Zapier pulling from Google Sheets, and wrote personalised copy introducing AutoWave Pro's eight AI capabilities. Campaign achieved 10 product sign-ups within the first week.

Case Study 04 — Automation & Email Design

Noire Atelier

Welcome Sequence · Booking Automation · Mailchimp

A two-part Mailchimp email sequence for a luxury wedding photography brand.

Designed and wrote a two-email onboarding sequence. The first email introduced the Noire Atelier brand and invited consultation requests. The second was an automated booking confirmation triggered via Mailchimp on form submission — personalised with the client's name, booking details, investment guide, and CTA to secure their consultation slot.
